method.name: IsAdvancedBlurAvailable
method.comment: Checks if advanced blur using RenderEffect (API 31+) is available on this device.

method.name: ApplyViewBlur
method.comment: Applies a blur effect to the target View. Automatically uses RenderEffect on API 31+ and a legacy bitmap blur on lower versions. Note: On legacy devices only the visible area of the View is blurred. If the View appears after scrolling (e.g. in ScrollView or RecyclerView), call this method again to refresh the blur. Example: Dim BlurFX As MP_BlurFX BlurFX.ApplyViewBlur(Panel1, 20)

method.name: RemoveViewBlur
method.comment: Removes the blur effect from the target View.

method.name: About
method.comment: Library Information Library Author: MohammadReza Pirzadeh Telegram Channel: B4X_Academy Telegram Group: B4X_Room

method.name: ShowFromView
method.comment: Displays the burst effect from the specified source view using a bitmap list. Example: Dim Bitmaps As List Bitmaps.Initialize Bitmaps.Add(LoadBitmap(File.DirAssets,"heart.png")) Bitmaps.Add(LoadBitmap(File.DirAssets,"heart2.png")) Bitmaps.Add(LoadBitmap(File.DirAssets,"star.png")) Bitmaps.Add(LoadBitmap(File.DirAssets,"like.png")) Bitmaps.Add(LoadBitmap(File.DirAssets,"gift.png")) Dim BurstFX As MP_BurstFX BurstFX.Initialize BurstFX.ItemSize = 55dip BurstFX.BurstAmount = 25 BurstFX.Alpha = 0.9 BurstFX.ExplosionSpread = 500 BurstFX.RandomRotation = True BurstFX.ScaleFade = True BurstFX.RandomSize = True BurstFX.ShowFromView(Activity, Button1, Bitmaps)

method.name: Duration
method.comment: Sets minimum and maximum animation duration.

method.name: Show
method.comment: Displays the burst effect using the provided bitmap list. Example: Dim Bitmaps As List Bitmaps.Initialize Bitmaps.Add(LoadBitmap(File.DirAssets,"heart.png")) Bitmaps.Add(LoadBitmap(File.DirAssets,"heart2.png")) Bitmaps.Add(LoadBitmap(File.DirAssets,"star.png")) Bitmaps.Add(LoadBitmap(File.DirAssets,"like.png")) Bitmaps.Add(LoadBitmap(File.DirAssets,"gift.png")) '------------------------------------------------- 'Example1: Dim BurstFX As MP_BurstFX BurstFX.Initialize BurstFX.ItemSize = 55dip BurstFX.BurstAmount = 150 BurstFX.Duration(1200, 2500) BurstFX.RandomRotation = True BurstFX.ScaleFade = True BurstFX.MinScale = 0.3 BurstFX.Interpolator = BurstFX.INTERP_ACCELERATE BurstFX.Direction = BurstFX.DIR_TOP BurstFX.Show(Activity, Bitmaps) '------------------------------------------------- 'Example2: Dim BurstFX As MP_BurstFX BurstFX.Initialize BurstFX.ItemSize = 55dip BurstFX.BurstAmount = 150 BurstFX.RandomRotation = True BurstFX.ExplosionSpread = 900 BurstFX.ScaleFade = True BurstFX.MinScale = 0.3 BurstFX.Direction = BurstFX.DIR_CENTER BurstFX.Show(Panel1, Bitmaps)

method.name: Reset
method.comment: Resets all effect settings to default values.

method.name: Initialize
method.comment: Initializes the burst effect.

method.name: About
method.comment: Library Information Library Author: MohammadReza Pirzadeh Telegram Channel: B4X_Academy Telegram Group: B4X_Room

property.name: BurstAmount
property.comment: Sets number of burst particles.

property.name: ExplosionSpread
property.comment: Sets explosion movement spread distance.

property.name: RandomSize
property.comment: Enables random particle sizes.

property.name: MinScale
property.comment: Sets minimum scale when scale fade is enabled.

property.name: Alpha
property.comment: Sets particle transparency alpha.

property.name: RandomRotation
property.comment: Enables or disables random particle rotation.

property.name: ScaleFade
property.comment: Enables particle scale fade animation.

property.name: PullY
property.comment: Adds vertical pull force to particle movement.

property.name: Interpolator
property.comment: Sets the animation interpolator type (default: INTERP_LINEAR).

property.name: ItemSize
property.comment: Sets particle item size in pixels.

property.name: Direction
property.comment: Sets burst animation direction (default: DIR_CENTER).

property.name: PullX
property.comment: Adds horizontal pull force to particle movement.

method.name: ApplyGlowEffect
method.comment: Applies a glow outline around the target View using a blurred outer stroke. Example: Dim GlowFX As MP_GlowFX GlowFX.ApplyGlowEffect(Panel1, 30, 0xFF00FFFF, 15dip)

method.name: IsStrongGlowAvailable
method.comment: Checks whether a strong glow effect is applied to the target View.

method.name: ApplySoftGlow
method.comment: Applies a soft layered glow around the target View. Example: Dim GlowFX As MP_GlowFX GlowFX.ApplySoftGlow(Panel1, 30, 0xFF00FFFF, 15dip)

method.name: StopStrongGlow
method.comment: Removes the strong glow effect from the target View.

method.name: StopGlowEffect
method.comment: Removes the glow effect from the target View.

method.name: IsGlowEffectAvailable
method.comment: Checks whether a glow effect is applied to the target View.

method.name: IsSoftGlowAvailable
method.comment: Checks whether a soft glow effect is applied to the target View.

method.name: About
method.comment: Library Information Library Author: MohammadReza Pirzadeh Telegram Channel: B4X_Academy Telegram Group: B4X_Room

method.name: StopSoftGlow
method.comment: Removes the soft glow effect from the target View.

method.name: IsAmbientGlowAvailable
method.comment: Checks whether an ambient glow effect is applied to the target View.

method.name: ApplyAmbientGlow
method.comment: Applies an ambient glow below the target View. Example: Dim GlowFX As MP_GlowFX GlowFX.ApplyAmbientGlow(Panel1, 30, 0xFF919191, 0.9, 0.8)

method.name: ApplyStrongGlow
method.comment: Applies a strong multi-layer glow around the target View. Example: Dim GlowFX As MP_GlowFX GlowFX.ApplyStrongGlow(Panel1, 30, 0xFF00FFFF, 15dip)

method.name: StopAmbientGlow
method.comment: Removes the ambient glow effect from the target View.

method.name: IsInnerNeonRunning
method.comment: Returns whether the inner neon glow effect is currently running on the target View.

method.name: IsOuterNeonRunning
method.comment: Returns whether the outer neon glow effect is currently running on the target View.

method.name: StopInnerNeon
method.comment: Stops the inner neon glow effect applied to the target View.

method.name: ApplyInnerNeon
method.comment: Applies an inner neon glow effect to the target View. Example: Dim NeonFX As MP_NeonFX NeonFX.ApplyInnerNeon(Panel1, 30, 0xFF00FFFF, 15dip)

method.name: StopOuterNeon
method.comment: Stops the outer neon glow effect applied to the target View.

method.name: ApplyOuterNeon
method.comment: Applies an outer neon glow effect around the target View. Example: Dim NeonFX As MP_NeonFX NeonFX.ApplyOuterNeon(Panel1, 30, 0xFF00FFFF, 15dip)

method.name: About
method.comment: Library Information Library Author: MohammadReza Pirzadeh Telegram Channel: B4X_Academy Telegram Group: B4X_Room

method.name: ApplyCenterRipple
method.comment: Applies a centered ripple effect to the target view. Must be called each time to trigger the effect.

method.name: ApplyClickEffect
method.comment: Applies a ripple click effect to the target view. Should be called only once.

method.name: About
method.comment: Library Information Library Author: MohammadReza Pirzadeh Telegram Channel: B4X_Academy Telegram Group: B4X_Room

method.name: ApplyGradientShader
method.comment: Applies and starts the animated gradient shader effect on the target view. Example: Dim ShaderFX As MP_ShaderFX ShaderFX.ApplyGradientShader(Panel1, Array As Int(0xFFFF006A, 0xFF7B1FA2, 0xFF00E5FF, 0xFFFF006A), 5000, 0, 2, False, False)

method.name: IsAuroraRadialRunning
method.comment: Returns true if the aurora-style radial shader animation on the target view is currently running.

method.name: PauseShader
method.comment: Pauses the currently running shader animation on the target view.

method.name: IsAuroraRadialAvailable
method.comment: Returns true if the aurora-style radial shader effect is available and initialized on the target view.

method.name: IsShaderPaused
method.comment: Returns true if the shader animation on the target view is currently paused.

method.name: InvalidateShader
method.comment: Forces the shader effect on the target view to redraw and refresh immediately.

method.name: IsAuroraRadialPaused
method.comment: Returns true if the aurora-style radial shader animation on the target view is currently paused.

method.name: ResumeAuroraRadial
method.comment: Resumes the previously paused aurora-style radial shader animation on the target view.

method.name: StopAuroraRadial
method.comment: Stops the aurora-style radial shader animation applied to the target view.

method.name: IsShaderRunning
method.comment: Returns true if the shader animation is currently running on the target view.

method.name: ApplyAuroraGradient
method.comment: Applies and starts the aurora-style animated gradient shader effect on the target view. Example: Dim ShaderFX As MP_ShaderFX ShaderFX.ApplyAuroraGradient(Panel1, Array As Int( 0xFFFF0080, 0xFF7928CA, 0xFF2AFADF, 0xFF00E5FF, 0xFFFF0080), 400dip, 10000, 45, 2, False) Example2: Dim ShaderFX As MP_ShaderFX ShaderFX.ApplyAuroraGradient(Button1, Array As Int(0xFF5E60CE, 0xFF64DFDF, 0xFF80FFDB, 0xFF6930C3, 0xFF5E60CE), 300dip, 20000, 45, 2, False)

method.name: About
method.comment: Library Information Library Author: MohammadReza Pirzadeh Telegram Channel: B4X_Academy Telegram Group: B4X_Room

method.name: StopShader
method.comment: Stops the shader animation on the target view and releases its resources.

method.name: ResumeShader
method.comment: Resumes the previously paused shader animation on the target view.

method.name: PauseAuroraRadial
method.comment: Pauses the aurora-style radial shader animation on the target view.

method.name: IsShaderAvailable
method.comment: Returns true if a shader effect is currently created and available on the target view.

method.name: InvalidateAuroraRadial
method.comment: Forces the aurora-style radial shader effect on the target view to refresh and redraw immediately.

method.name: SetShaderSpeed
method.comment: Sets the animation speed of the shader effect on the target view.

method.name: SetAuroraRadialSpeed
method.comment: Sets the animation speed of the aurora-style radial shader effect on the target view.

method.name: ApplyShadow
method.comment: Applies a colored shadow effect to the target view. Supported on Android 9 (API 28) and higher only. Example: Dim ShadowFX As MP_ShadowFX ShadowFX.ApplyShadow(Button1, 0xFFFF006A, 0.8, 8dip)

method.name: IsColoredShadowSupported
method.comment: Returns whether the device supports modern colored elevation shadows. Available only on Android 9 (API 28) and higher.

method.name: About
method.comment: Library Information Library Author: MohammadReza Pirzadeh Telegram Channel: B4X_Academy Telegram Group: B4X_Room

method.name: ApplyShimmer
method.comment: Applies a shimmer highlight animation effect to the target View. Example: Dim ShimmerFX As MP_ShimmerFX ShimmerFX.ApplyShimmer(Panel1, 0xFF9C9C9C, 2000, 0.15, 0.3, 5dip)

method.name: RemoveShimmer
method.comment: Removes the shine sweep animation effect applied to the target View.

method.name: About
method.comment: Library Information Library Author: MohammadReza Pirzadeh Telegram Channel: B4X_Academy Telegram Group: B4X_Room

method.name: IsSnakeBorderAvailable
method.comment: Checks whether the snake border effect is currently attached to the view.

method.name: ResumeSnakeBorder
method.comment: Resumes animation.

method.name: IsSnakeBorderRunning
method.comment: Returns true if effect is running.

method.name: StopSnakeBorder
method.comment: Stops and removes effect.

method.name: PauseSnakeBorder
method.comment: Pauses animation.

method.name: SetSpeed
method.comment: Changes animation speed.

method.name: ApplySnakeBorder
method.comment: Applies animated snake border effect. Example: Dim SnakeFX As MP_SnakeBorderFX SnakeFX.ApplySnakeBorder(Panel1, Colors.Cyan, 2.5dip, 180dip, 2200, 1.0, SnakeFX.MODE_SOLID) Example2: Dim SnakeFX As MP_SnakeBorderFX SnakeFX.ApplySnakeBorder(Panel1, Colors.Cyan, 2.5dip, 180dip, 2200, 1.0, SnakeFX.MODE_FADE) SnakeFX.SetTailAlpha(Panel1, 0.1)

method.name: SetTailAlpha
method.comment: Sets the transparency of the snake tail. This parameter is applied only when the effect mode is MODE_FADE. In MODE_SOLID this value has no effect. Alpha Tail transparency value (0.0 - 1.0)

method.name: IsTextShaderPaused
method.comment: Returns whether the text shader effect is currently paused on the target TextView.

method.name: ResumeTextShader
method.comment: Resumes the animated shader effect on the text of the target TextView if it was paused.

method.name: SetTextShaderSpeed
method.comment: Sets the animation speed of the shader effect applied to the text of the target TextView.

method.name: IsTextShaderAvailable
method.comment: Returns whether a text shader effect is currently applied to the target TextView.

method.name: StopTextShadowShader
method.comment: Stops the shadow shader effect applied to the text of the target TextView.

method.name: ApplyTextShadowShader
method.comment: Applies a shadow-based shader effect to the text content of the target TextView. Example: Dim TextShaderFX As MP_TextShaderFX TextShaderFX.ApplyTextShadowShader(Label1, 45, 0, 0, 200)

method.name: StopTextShader
method.comment: Stops the shader effect applied to the text of the target TextView.

method.name: ApplyTextShader
method.comment: Applies a shader effect to the text content of the target TextView (e.g., Button, Label, etc.). Example: Dim TextShaderFX As MP_TextShaderFX TextShaderFX.ApplyTextShader(Label1, Array As Int(0xFFFF006A, 0xFF7B1FA2, 0xFF00E5FF, 0xFFFF006A), 3500, 10, 2, False, False)

method.name: PauseTextShader
method.comment: Pauses the animated shader effect applied to the text of the target TextView.

method.name: IsTextShaderRunning
method.comment: Returns whether the text shader effect is currently running on the target TextView.

method.name: About
method.comment: Library Information Library Author: MohammadReza Pirzadeh Telegram Channel: B4X_Academy Telegram Group: B4X_Room

method.name: Gradient
method.comment: Sets background gradient colors.

method.name: Border
method.comment: Sets border color and width.

method.name: Offset
method.comment: Sets X and Y offset of the toast.

property.name: Position
property.comment: Sets toast position using Gravity.

property.name: MaxLines
property.comment: Sets max text lines.

property.name: LayoutDirectionRTL
property.comment: Enables or disables RTL text direction.

property.name: Font
property.comment: Sets text typeface.

property.name: Padding
property.comment: Sets inner padding.

method.name: CancelCurrent
method.comment: Cancels the currently visible toast.

method.name: Show
method.comment: Displays a customizable toast message. If Icon is null, no icon will be displayed. If Config is null, the default configuration will be used. Example: Dim Toast As MP_ToastFX Toast.Initialize Toast.Show("Operation completed successfully", True, Null, Null) Example2: Dim Toast As MP_ToastFX Toast.Initialize Toast.Show("Saved successfully", False, LoadBitmap(File.DirAssets, "logo.png"), Null) Example3: Dim Config As MP_ToastConfig Config.Position = Gravity.TOP Config.Offset(0, 100) Dim Toast As MP_ToastFX Toast.Initialize Toast.Show("Top message", False, Null, Config) Example4: Dim Config As MP_ToastConfig Config.BackgroundColor = Colors.Red Config.TextColor = Colors.White Config.CornerRadius = 30 Config.TextSize = 16 Dim Toast As MP_ToastFX Toast.Initialize Toast.Show("Error", True, Null, Config) Example5: Dim Config As MP_ToastConfig Config.TextColor = Colors.White Config.CornerRadius = 12dip Config.TextSize = 16 Config.Alpha = 0.95 Config.Gradient(0xFF7F00FF, 0xFFE100FF) Dim Toast As MP_ToastFX Toast.Initialize Toast.Show("Download completed", False, Null, Config) Example6: Dim Config As MP_ToastConfig Config.BackgroundColor = 0xFF263238 Config.TextColor = Colors.White Config.TextSize = 18 Config.MaxLines = 5 Config.Padding = 35 Config.Alpha = 0.9 Config.Font = Typeface.LoadFromAssets("vazir-regular.ttf") Dim Toast As MP_ToastFX Toast.Initialize Toast.Show("This is a multi-line toast message example.", True, Null, Config)

method.name: ClearQueue
method.comment: Clears all pending toasts from queue.

method.name: Initialize
method.comment: Initializes the toast engine.

method.name: About
method.comment: Library Information Library Author: MohammadReza Pirzadeh Telegram Channel: B4X_Academy Telegram Group: B4X_Room

property.name: IsShowing
property.comment: Returns true if a toast is being shown.

property.name: ReplaceCurrent
property.comment: Replaces current toast when a new one is shown.

property.name: QueueSize
property.comment: Returns the number of queued toasts.

property.name: DefaultConfig
property.comment: Sets a new default configuration. After setting this, any simple toast (shown without a custom config) will automatically use this configuration.
